serverOffline.title: Server not running
serverOffline.description: No CCRelay instance is available. Start the server from the desktop tray or extension menu.
serverOffline.waiting: Waiting for server to come back…
serverOffline.hint: The dashboard will reopen automatically when the server is reachable again.

language.title: Choose Language
language.description: Select your preferred language for the interface.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor your CCRelay server status and performance

clientConfig.title: Client configuration
clientConfig.pageSubtitle: Point Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and Codex at this CCRelay instance
clientConfig.description: Check Claude Desktop, Claude Code ({{claudePath}}), and Codex ({{codexPath}}) configs point to this CCRelay instance (port {{port}}).

rules.aliasHeaderNonEmpty: x-ccrelay-model-alias header with non-empty value (key case-insensitive)

optionalModels.title: Optional default model names
optionalModels.description: (CCRelay modelMap is usually enough. Set these only if you want Claude Code to request specific ids.)

overwrite.title: Overwrite Claude Code settings?
overwrite.invalidJson: Invalid JSON will be replaced by a new object with the merged env block.

restore.title: Restore {{name}} config?
restore.claudeDescription: This will remove CCRelay-injected keys (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN, etc.) from settings.json. Other settings are preserved.
restore.codexDescription: This will remove the CCRelay model provider section from config.toml and reset the model to the default.
restore.claudeDesktopDescription: This will remove CCRelay config files from the Claude-3p directory, revert deploymentMode to 1p, and delete developer_settings.json.

codexModelModal.title: Codex model
codexModelModal.description: Written to model in ~/.codex/config.toml. Leave empty to use the default.
codexModelModal.label: Model

modelsModal.title: Claude Code default model names
modelsModal.description: Written to env.ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_*_MODEL in settings.json. Leave blank and save to remove a key. Empty all three to rely only on CCRelay mapping.

smartRouting.title: Smart Routing
smartRouting.subtitle: Aggregate provider model lists and route requests by model id
smartRouting.disabledHint: Smart routing is not enabled. Enable it on the Providers page to aggregate models and route by model id.

catalog.title: Aggregated models
catalog.previewHint: Preview only. Smart routing is not active yet — enable it on the Providers tab.
catalog.empty: No models in catalog yet. Refresh cache or configure providers.
catalog.emptyWithErrors: No models aggregated. Fix provider fetch errors above and refresh cache.

providerErrors.title: Some providers failed to fetch models

aliasDrift.title: Alias hash drift
aliasDrift.description: Some custom model aliases differ from the canonical hash. Update to avoid cross-provider collisions.
aliasDrift.collisionWarning: Duplicate alias with: {{peers}}. Keeping may fall back to first-match routing for this alias.

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Choose Smart Routing or a single provider as the routing source

smartRoutingCard.summaryDisabled: Aggregates {{providers}} providers · {{models}} models. Click to enable.

providers.emptyState: No providers configured. Click "Add" to create one.

modal.alwaysOnTooltip: The official provider must stay enabled.
modal.name: Name
modal.apiKeyHelpEdit: Click the edit button to change the API key.
modal.apiKeyHelpAdd: Supports ${ENV_VAR} syntax. Cannot be modified after creation.
modal.saveConfirmBoth: Provider ID and API Key will be changed.
modal.idTaken: This ID is already in use.
modal.customModelsListHelp: When enabled, GET /models is answered locally from this list (no upstream). Each line: real model id, or realId;display name, or realId;display name;alias (use realId;;alias when display equals id). Without HTTP header x-ccrelay-model-alias, list/detail return the real id; with that header, wire id is the alias segment. Optional query limit truncates the returned page; Anthropic-shaped responses set has_more accordingly.
modal.modelIds: Model ids (one per line; realId or realId;display or realId;display;alias)
modal.modelMappingHelp: When off, the YAML below is kept in config but not applied (requests, model lists, and response model stay unmapped).
modal.modelMapHelp: Optional. Leave empty to pass models through without remapping.
modal.coworkHelperDesc: Enter upstream model IDs and optional display names. Generates the custom model list and matching model map in one step.
modal.coworkHelperRequiresId: Fill in Provider ID and protocol before generating aliases.
modal.rebuildModelMapHelp: Rebuild exact alias rules from the custom model list and keep wildcards.

validation.patternModelRequired: Each entry must have 'pattern' and 'model' fields

duplicateModal.title: Duplicate provider
duplicateModal.name: Name
duplicateModal.namePlaceholder: Display name for the new provider
duplicateModal.idHelp: Only alphanumeric, underscore, and hyphen. If that key already exists, the request will fail; remove or rename the other entry first.

chooser.customDesc: Full provider form with YAML model map and advanced options.

field.name: Display name
field.claudeSupport: Support Claude Cowork / Claude Code / Codex

models.authError: Authentication failed (401/403). Check your API key.
models.networkError: Could not reach the endpoint. Check the URL.

test.noModel: Enter at least one upstream model ID to test.
test.noProbeModels: No models listed yet — wait for endpoint fetch or enable custom model list.
test.pickModelDescription: Multiple models were returned from the endpoint. Select one to run the test.

help.azureEndpoint: Your Azure OpenAI base URL, e.g. https://…cognitiveservices.azure.com/openai/v1
help.customEndpoint: Paste your upstream base URL (must match the protocol you chose: OpenAI Chat or Anthropic Messages).
help.presetEndpointDefault: Official API URL by default; edit if you use another host or proxy.
help.models: One upstream model id per line. Use id;display name to set a custom display name (semicolon separates id from name).
help.claudeSupport: Enables alias mapping for Cowork clients: each model gets a claude-{hash} alias in the model list; clients sending x-ccrelay-model-alias header will see aliases instead of real ids. Also adds claude-* and gpt-* wildcard patterns mapped to the first model for Claude Code and Codex.

logs.title: Request Logs
logs.subtitle: View and analyze API request logs

routeType.serviceHint: Handled locally by a registered capability (not proxied upstream).

logs.emptyMessage: No logs found. Make sure log storage is enabled.

analysis.parseFailed: Failed to parse content into markdown.

clearDialog.title: Clear All Logs
clearDialog.description: Are you sure you want to clear all logs? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage server, routing, concurrency, and logging configuration.
settings.restartRequired: Changes saved. A server restart is required for these settings to take effect.

routing.title: Routing

group.customHint: Any other patterns; rows from Add appear here until they match a group above.

blockCondition.noConditionHint: No provider condition — click to add Only when / Unless lists
blockCondition.clearUnless: Clear all entries under "Unless..." below to edit this section.
blockCondition.clearOnlyWhen: Clear all entries under "Only when..." above to edit this section.

blockConditionModal.title: Block condition (provider)
blockConditionModal.description: Pick one mode at a time: set Only-when to restrict to specific providers, or set Unless to exclude specific providers. They are mutually exclusive — filling one disables the other.

helpBox.title: Routing and 404
helpBox.description: Rules are evaluated in order. The first match wins. Provider "auto" means use the current default provider. Unmatched paths fall through to the proxy and may return 404 if no provider handles them.

routing.restoreTooltipEnabled: Load bundled defaults into the editor (use Save to write config.yaml)
routing.restoreTooltipDisabled: Default routing template unavailable from server

restoreDialog.title: Restore default routing?
restoreDialog.description: This replaces the forward and block lists in the editor with CCRelay's bundled defaults. Nothing is written to disk until you click Save routing.

concurrency.title: Concurrency
concurrency.routeOverrides: {{count}} per-route override(s) configured. Edit in YAML for now.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Configure extra service capabilities for providers

webSearch.title: Web Search
webSearch.description: For Claude Desktop and Claude Code only. When the client invokes the built-in WebSearch tool, ccrelay intercepts that tool call and runs search using the backend you configure below (Tavily or GLM).
webSearch.disabledHint: Web search is off. Provider assignments and search settings are kept and apply when you turn it on again.
webSearch.providerAssignmentHint: Select which LLM providers should have web search enabled
